Bi-Weekly Report
• The VLCC Market Remains under Persistent Downward Pressure Amid Oversupply, Reduced Demand - As we move into the
second half of June and the final stretch of the first half of the year, renewed downward pressure is again the main
dynamic for the VLCC market with sluggish performance in both the Atlantic and Pacific basins. As open tonnage becomes
less of an issue for charterers and with limited signs of a rebound, the current softening trend should remain in place for
the foreseeable future.
